notes: !fastmine on an empty bar refuses PLAIN with the oracle dig() hint (`⚡ You're out of energy — rest a moment (~{wait}s until your next dig) or eat a **ration** / **energy drink** (`!use ration`).`) — a pre-txn pure read: no loot, no energy write, no game XP, no mining db_delta

payload.content: ⚡ You're out of energy — rest a moment (~5s until your next dig) or eat a **ration** / **energy drink** (`!use ration`).
